title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Win Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's victory strengthens their position in the ACC Tournament and impacts their NCAA tournament prospects.

title: Virginia Secures Victory Against NC State, 81-74
summary: Virginia defeats NC State for the third time this season, with Malik Thomas and Thijs De Ridder leading the scoring.
